title: National Treasury Board Meeting — February 2025
attendees: Veronica Nduva (PS, State Department for Planning)
agenda:
1. FY2025/26 Budget Policy Statement Approval
2. Public Debt Management Strategy 2025-2028
3. SOE Dividend Policy Review
4. Kenya Airways Restructuring Support Framework
5. Fiscal Risk Register Review
minutes: FY2025/26 Budget Policy Statement approved for tabling in National Assembly. Public Debt Management Strategy 2025-2028 approved. SOE dividend policy revised to minimum 25% payout. Kenya Airways restructuring support framework approved.

resolutions.title: Approval of FY2025/26 Budget Policy Statement
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the FY2025/26 Budget Policy Statement targeting a fiscal deficit of 4.3% of GDP.

resolutions.title: Approval of Public Debt Management Strategy 2025-2028
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the Medium-Term Debt Management Strategy 2025-2028.

title: National Treasury Special Meeting — January 2025
attendees: Veronica Nduva (PS, State Department for Planning)
agenda:
1. Kenya Airways Restructuring Support Framework
2. SOE Dividend Policy — Minimum 25% Payout
minutes: Kenya Airways restructuring support framework including KES 12 billion government guarantee facility approved. SOE dividend policy revised to minimum 25% payout ratio.

resolutions.title: Approval of Kenya Airways Restructuring Support Framework
resolutions.description: The Board resolved to approve the financial restructuring support framework for Kenya Airways including a KES 12 billion government guarantee facility.

title: National Treasury Board Meeting — Scheduled May 2025
agenda:
1. Q1 FY2025/26 Budget Execution Review
2. Public Debt Report Q1 2025
3. SOE Dividend Remittances Update
4. Fiscal Risk Register Review
